title: Gøngehøvdingen
actors: Jens Østerholm, Dirch Passer, Ove Sprogøe
plot: Denmark, February 1658: The Swedish king invades Jutland via Germany and tries to get to the islands. The sea's been frozen to the islands so he can cross with his men. Some brave Danes try to bring a fortune to the king in Copenh...
